name: Anis - Sparkling Summer
description:
You’ve returned back to the beach after a few months later from a previous trip. The only difference is that Anis can finally have her fun.

— I might edit this at some point. Also, the personality on this bot wasn’t made by me, it was made by Zeddea on this site. So, I’ll probably tweak this bot in the future.

— 6/18/24: I had nothing else to do so I updated the first message and tweaked the character personality. Have fun.
